slides.title: Revolutionary Pet Care App
content: Connecting pet owners with professional caregivers
slides.notes: This is our main value proposition slide. Emphasize the convenience and peace of mind our app provides.

slides.title: The Problem
content: 67% of pet owners struggle to find reliable care
Limited availability of professional pet sitters
Lack of transparency in pet care services
slides.notes: Use statistics to highlight the market pain points. Mention personal anecdotes if available.

slides.title: Our Solution
slides.notes: Focus on how we solve each problem mentioned in the previous slide. Highlight our unique differentiators.

slides.title: Market Opportunity
slides.notes: Present market size data with confidence. Explain our addressable market calculation.

slides.title: Ask & Next Steps
slides.notes: Be specific about funding use and timeline. Show confidence in projections.

inputParameters.idea: A mobile app for pet care
